title: Stellar Paths
description: Another origins mod. But, more like origins classes.
body:
*One day, the stars came down. They bestowed their blessings on the races of the Overworld, Nether, and End.*

This mod is an addition to [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) about paths, which grant bonuses beyond the basic origin
benefits and drawbacks. It is similar to [Origins Classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-classes). However, it does not work quite the same.
The "Paths" are different than classes. Examples of paths are in the gallery.

This mod does _**not**_ replace the base origins.
It just adds another layer to pick after you've picked your base origin.
The mod should be fully compatible with other origins addons, unless you happen to use the same layer name.

**(To be clear this means it is compatible with all origins mods unless there is a function that ends up with the same name.)**

Credits:
[Apace](https://modrinth.com/user/Apace), the original creator of the origins mod.
